# Gajae Workflow Parity Matrix

Wave 1 behavioral/protocol parity inventory for ASA runtime workflow harness work. This matrix records contracts only; it does not copy Gajae source code.

| ID | Gajae reference | Behavioral contract | ASA target | Tests | Status | Verification evidence | Anti-false-green |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

Clients parse it as a workflow gate without requiring an event envelope. | `sim_agent/agents_sdk_runtime/workflow_harness.py`, `sim_agent/agents_sdk_runtime/workflow_runtime.py`, `tests/test_workflow_gate_protocol.py` | `tests/test_workflow_parity_matrix.py`, `tests/test_workflow_runtime_parity.py::test_rich_gate_blocks_until_runtime_response_and_persists_flat_shape` | implemented | `.omo/evidence/asa-gajae-workflow-gap-closure/final-action-lifecycle-slice-pytest.txt` | Remove or corrupt verification evidence for workflow_gate_flat_shape. Blocker: `parity_evidence_missing`. |
